title: Amtech B1150 250mm (10") Slip-Joint Water Pump Pliers
features: DURABLE: This 250mm (10") slip-joint water pump plier is made from heavy duty carbon steel for durability
COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: With soft touch PVC dipped handles for comfort, the water pump grip has an easy to adjust slip joint mechanism
PRACTICAL SIZE: 250mm length provides reach and stability.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your plumbing requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
